name: DeMoD Jam
author: DeMoD LLC
description: Collaborative audio jam over the certified DCF-Audio wire (17-byte DeModFrame; PCM-diag / Opus / Faust-PM codecs). Latency-first (SuperPack) or quality-first (Reed-Solomon FEC) delivery with profile-invariant ts24 sync. Self-certifying pure-Lua framing.
